title: Phularwan Heat Wave
lead: Phularwan is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +5.34. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, posing a significant threat to its residents.
body:
The current heat wave in Phularwan has resulted in a score of 10.0 out of 10, indicating a severe anomaly. 
 The city's HDD is 0.0 GG, while its CDD is 17.7 GG, further emphasizing the intensity of the heat wave. 
 With an umidita of 32% and vento of 4.8 km/h, the conditions are extremely unfavorable, leading to a critical level of heat stress.
conclusion: Immediately activate heat wave mitigation protocols to ensure public safety.
